ab: Nacila, miliso’ay kako ato ama ako to faki ako.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: Pasowalen nira kami, maofangay ko fadahong no loma’.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: Yo misanga’ cira to fadahong i, matefaday nanifadahong.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: Paterongen no ama ci faki to titi no kolong ato ’icep.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: Malaholoholol kako ato faki i kafoti’an, adihay ko mipainian nira a kongko.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: Yo mamiliyas kako i, ’akawangay to kako, sanengseng haca saan ci faki,
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: Pacako han ako, “Ano ma’adah to ko oo’ no faki i, katayhi ho i loma’ niyam a misalama.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
